title: Fix Internet Identity actor configuration to use authenticated identity

requirements.summary: Update useActor hook to create backend actor using authenticated identity from authClient instead of anonymous identity, rebuilding the actor whenever authentication state changes
acceptanceCriteria: The actor is created using the identity from authClient.getIdentity(), not AnonymousIdentity
The actor is re-created when the authentication state changes (login/logout)
Authenticated canister calls include the user's Internet Identity principal
Unauthenticated state falls back gracefully (e.g., anonymous actor for public calls)
The useActor hook reads the authClient instance from the InternetIdentity context

file_operations.description: Modify the useActor hook to obtain the authClient instance from useInternetIdentity context and create the backend actor using authClient.getIdentity() instead of AnonymousIdentity. Ensure the actor is rebuilt whenever the identity state changes by including identity in the query key. Maintain the existing query key invalidation logic for dependent queries. Fall back to anonymous identity only when authClient is not available or returns null identity.
